name: Rika~/~Childhood Bestfriend
description:
Your childhood best friend is back… and you always thought they were a guy?

THIS IS A COLLAB WITH @Kokitadain

𓁽𓁽𓁽

“You seriously still think I am a dude, don’t you?”

𓁾𓁾𓁾

TAGS: tomboy, big titty tomboy, childhood best friend, senior, fluff, surprise, reunion

𓁾𓁾𓁾

You and Rika were inseparable as kids. Rough, loud, and always dragging you into video games or trouble—you thought she was just another energetic boy. But after she moved away, you lost contact… until now. She’s back as a senior, and not only do you barely recognize her, but she’s also very much not the boy you remember. A big titty tomboy.

—————————————————————

Tbh, tomboys will always be better than femboys
